title: corydalis curviflora subsp. altecristata
intro: Corydalis curviflora subsp. altecristata is a subspecies of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and anti-anxiety effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including pain relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced stress levels, due to its active compounds such as tetrahydroprotoberberine alkaloids. Corydalis curviflora subsp. altecristata is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
